tier_c.description: Non-EC2 findings — log groups, ghost resources, S3

C1.description: CloudWatch log group with no retention policy

finding.detection_reason: Log group /aws/lambda/payment-processor has no retention policy — logs accumulate indefinitely.

agent2_decision.detection_reason: Log group /aws/lambda/payment-processor has no retention_in_days set — logs accumulate indefinitely at $0.76/month.

key_facts: log group /aws/lambda/payment-processor has no retention policy
logs accumulate indefinitely — 1.57 GB/month at $0.76/month cost
fix: add retention_in_days to existing aws_cloudwatch_log_group resource
no new resources required — simple attribute addition

C2.description: CloudWatch log group with high ingestion volume — S3 archival recommended

finding.detection_reason: Log group /aws/eks/production-cluster ingests 12.87 GB/month — exceeds 10 GB/month threshold. S3 archival recommended.

agent2_decision.detection_reason: Log group /aws/eks/production-cluster ingests 12.87 GB/month — exceeds 10 GB/month threshold. S3 subscription filter archival recommended.

key_facts: 12.87 GB/month ingestion exceeds 10 GB/month threshold
S3 archival via subscription filter is the correct action
requires 3 new resources: subscription filter + S3 bucket + IAM role
existing log group retention stays — subscription is additive
aws_caller_identity must be used — no hardcoded account IDs

C3.description: Ghost EIP — unattached for more than 48 hours

finding.detection_reason: EIP 54.23.11.204 unattached for 12 days — confirmed ghost resource.

agent2_decision.detection_reason: EIP 54.23.11.204 unattached for 12 days — confirmed ghost resource. No data loss risk: EIP carries no data.

key_facts: EIP 54.23.11.204 unattached for 12 days — confirmed ghost
$3.60/month wasted on unused allocation
EIP has no data — release is safe
lifecycle prevent_destroy = false required to allow destroy
FinOpsAction tag must be added

C4.description: Ghost EBS volume — available state for more than 48 hours

finding.detection_reason: EBS volume vol-0a1b2c3d4e5f6a7b8 (100 GB gp3) in available state for 7 days — confirmed ghost resource. Data loss warning: volume contents will be permanently deleted.

agent2_decision.detection_reason: EBS volume vol-0a1b2c3d4e5f6a7b8 (100 GB gp3) in available state for 7 days — confirmed ghost resource. DATA LOSS: volume contents will be permanently deleted.

key_facts: EBS volume vol-0a1b2c3d4e5f6a7b8 (100 GB gp3) unattached 7 days
$8.00/month wasted
DATA LOSS: volume contents permanently deleted — must be explicitly acknowledged
data_loss_acknowledged field must be true in response
lifecycle prevent_destroy = false required
business_justification must explain irreversibility

C5.description: S3 bucket with cold data — Glacier transition recommended

finding.detection_reason: 84.7% of objects in company-data-archive-prod are older than 90 days with no lifecycle policy. Glacier Instant Retrieval transition recommended.

agent2_decision.detection_reason: 84.7% of objects in company-data-archive-prod are older than 90 days with no lifecycle policy — Glacier Instant Retrieval transition saves $34.09/month.

key_facts: 84.7% of 84,320 objects older than 90 days
no lifecycle policy currently set
Glacier Instant Retrieval transition at 90 days saves $34.09/month
aws_s3_bucket_lifecycle_configuration must be a separate resource (not inline)
transition noncurrent versions too if applicable

C6.description: CloudWatch log group already has retention policy set — no action needed

finding.detection_reason: Log group /aws/lambda/order-service already has retention_in_days = 30. No action required.

agent2_decision.detection_reason: Log group /aws/lambda/order-service has retention_in_days = 30 — already compliant, no action needed.

key_facts: retention_in_days = 30 is already set on the log group
no lifecycle violation — resource is compliant
LLM must confirm CLEAN and must NOT output any Terraform modification
ingestion volume is low (0.31 GB/month) — S3 archival not warranted

C7.description: Idle NAT Gateway — near-zero traffic for 14 days, no dependent workloads

finding.name: nat-gw-staging-app
finding.detection_reason: NAT Gateway nat-gw-staging-app processed 7 KB/day average over 14 days — below 1 MB/day idle threshold. No active routes use this gateway.

agent2_decision.detection_reason: NAT Gateway nat-gw-staging-app is idle (7 KB/day) for 14 days. No data loss risk: NAT Gateways are stateless. Associated EIP eipalloc-0b2c3d4e5f6a7b8c9 should also be released.

key_facts: NAT Gateway processed only 7 KB/day — well below 1 MB/day idle threshold
idle for 14 days — confirmed ghost resource
$33.48/month wasted ($0.045/hr fixed charge + negligible data cost)
NAT Gateways are stateless — no data loss on destroy
associated EIP eipalloc-0b2c3d4e5f6a7b8c9 must also be released — otherwise EIP incurs $3.60/month idle charge
lifecycle prevent_destroy = false required on both aws_nat_gateway and aws_eip

C8.description: ALB with 0 healthy targets and zero traffic for 7 days — ghost load balancer

finding.detection_reason: ALB api-staging-alb has 0 healthy targets and 0 requests over 7 days — confirmed ghost load balancer.

agent2_decision.detection_reason: ALB api-staging-alb has 0 healthy targets and 0 requests for 7 days. No data loss: ALBs are stateless. All dependent listeners and target groups should be removed.

key_facts: ALB api-staging-alb has 0 healthy targets and 0 requests for 7 days — ghost resource
$18.40/month wasted ($0.008/LCU-hour fixed ALB charge)
ALBs are stateless — no data loss on destroy
all 3 dependent resources must have lifecycle { prevent_destroy = false }: aws_lb, aws_lb_listener, aws_lb_target_group
verification: confirm no Route 53 records or other services reference this ALB DNS name before destroying

C9.description: ECR repository with no lifecycle policy — 289 untagged images accumulating at $4.83/month

finding.detection_reason: ECR repository api-service has 289 untagged images (48.3 GB total) with no lifecycle policy — images accumulate indefinitely.

agent2_decision.detection_reason: ECR repository api-service has 289 untagged images and no lifecycle policy. Adding a lifecycle rule to expire untagged images after 1 day and cap tagged images at 30 saves $4.25/month.

key_facts: 289 untagged images accumulating — no lifecycle policy set
48.3 GB total storage at $4.83/month; lifecycle reduces this to ~$0.58/month
aws_ecr_lifecycle_policy must be a separate resource (not inline)
lifecycle rules must: (1) expire untagged images after 1 day, (2) cap tagged images at 30
data_loss_acknowledged must be true — existing untagged images will be deleted when policy is applied
existing aws_ecr_repository block must remain unchanged

C10.description: Lambda provisioned concurrency = 5 configured but function has 0 invocations in 30 days

finding.detection_reason: Lambda order-processor-prod has provisioned_concurrency = 5 but 0 invocations in 30 days — paying $37.84/month for idle warm capacity.

agent2_decision.detection_reason: Lambda order-processor-prod: provisioned_concurrency=5 with 0 invocations for 30 days. Removing provisioned concurrency eliminates $37.84/month charge. On-demand invocation is free up to 1M requests/month.

key_facts: provisioned_concurrency = 5 with 0 invocations over 30 days — confirmed idle
$37.84/month wasted on warm capacity that is never used
removing provisioned concurrency does NOT affect the function itself — only cold start latency
data_loss_acknowledged = false — no data is stored in provisioned concurrency
the aws_lambda_provisioned_concurrency_config resource block must be removed entirely
aws_lambda_function block must remain unchanged

CM1.description: 2 ghost resources — unattached EIP + available EBS volume, both DESTROY, different data_loss profiles

finding.detection_reason: EIP 52.14.88.201 unattached for 9 days — confirmed ghost resource.

agent2_decision.detection_reason: EIP 52.14.88.201 unattached for 9 days. No data loss: EIP carries no data.

finding.detection_reason: EBS volume vol-0b2c3d4e5f6a7b801 (100 GB gp3) in available state for 5 days — confirmed ghost resource. Data loss warning: volume contents will be permanently deleted.

agent2_decision.detection_reason: EBS volume vol-0b2c3d4e5f6a7b801 (100 GB gp3) available for 5 days — ghost resource. DATA LOSS: volume contents permanently deleted.

key_facts: EIP 52.14.88.201 unattached 9 days — ghost resource
$3.60/month wasted on idle allocation
EIP carries no data — data_loss_acknowledged must be false
lifecycle prevent_destroy = false required
EBS vol-0b2c3d4e5f6a7b801 (100 GB gp3) available 5 days — ghost resource
$8.00/month wasted
DATA LOSS: volume contents permanently deleted — data_loss_acknowledged must be true
lifecycle prevent_destroy = false required

group_summary_must_mention: EBS vol-0b2c3d4e5f6a7b801 DESTROY — DATA LOSS acknowledged

CM2.description: Mixed actions — CloudWatch log group needs retention policy + idle NAT Gateway needs destroy

finding.detection_reason: Log group /aws/lambda/checkout-service has no retention policy — logs accumulate indefinitely.

agent2_decision.detection_reason: Log group /aws/lambda/checkout-service has no retention_in_days — logs accumulate indefinitely at $0.31/month.

finding.name: nat-gw-legacy-batch
finding.detection_reason: NAT Gateway nat-gw-legacy-batch processed 4 KB/day average over 21 days — idle for 3 weeks.

agent2_decision.detection_reason: NAT Gateway nat-gw-legacy-batch idle (4 KB/day) for 21 days. NAT Gateways are stateless. Associated EIP eipalloc-0c1d2e3f4a5b6c701 should also be released.

key_facts: log group /aws/lambda/checkout-service has no retention_in_days set
0.63 GB/month ingestion at $0.31/month — adding retention saves ongoing cost
fix: add retention_in_days to existing aws_cloudwatch_log_group block
data_loss_acknowledged = false — retention does not delete existing logs immediately
NAT Gateway nat-gw-legacy-batch processed only 4 KB/day over 21 days — confirmed idle
$33.48/month wasted on fixed NAT Gateway charge
NAT Gateways are stateless — data_loss_acknowledged = false
lifecycle prevent_destroy = false required on both aws_nat_gateway and aws_eip
associated EIP eipalloc-0c1d2e3f4a5b6c701 must also be released

CM3.description: Mixed verdicts — log group already compliant (OPTIMAL/NONE) + ECR no lifecycle policy (OPTIMAL/LLM_GENERATED)

finding.detection_reason: Log group /aws/lambda/user-auth already has retention_in_days = 14. No action required.

agent2_decision.detection_reason: Log group /aws/lambda/user-auth has retention_in_days = 14 — already compliant, no action needed.

finding.detection_reason: ECR repository backend-service has 368 untagged images (61.7 GB) with no lifecycle policy.

agent2_decision.detection_reason: ECR repository backend-service has 368 untagged images and no lifecycle policy. Adding lifecycle rules saves $5.73/month.

key_facts: retention_in_days = 14 is already set — resource is compliant
terraform_action must be NONE — do NOT generate any Terraform for this finding
terraform_block must be null
ingestion volume is low (0.25 GB/month) — S3 archival not warranted
368 untagged images accumulating — no lifecycle policy set
61.7 GB total; lifecycle reduces cost from $6.17 to ~$0.44/month
aws_ecr_lifecycle_policy must be a separate resource (not inline)
rules: expire untagged images after 1 day, cap tagged images at 30
data_loss_acknowledged = true — existing untagged images will be deleted
aws_ecr_repository block must remain unchanged

group_summary_must_mention: /aws/lambda/user-auth CLEAN — already compliant, no Terraform generated
